canonical_lifecycle_note: V1 local-deterministic model. External runtime lifecycle (/session → /continuity → /authority → /compile) is SEQUENCED for post-V1. governed_files_hash provides repo-verifiable content binding. Owner workflow_dispatch provides explicit authorization.
intent: Harvest Agent-Authored-By/Agent-Assisted-By commit trailers into Merge Guard attribution (continuity-merge-guard.yml) and mark commit-trailer harvesting implemented in AGENT_ATTRIBUTION_POLICY.json. Conservative key set, harvest-only; non-blocking; canonical_hash unchanged.
